texto: my mine ,I searching for you ..long time in the trip time walls,searching you in was me..I never felt lonely,this world always singeven at grave heart'sbeing numb to hearyour song is ..What the dealt of this life saidso breathe in wind singingsinking sailing in waves,and breathe out find me..in the rain and riversbut you and me are the ocean,you know ? in long time agothe time in this room make you forget..keep searching time with me and i.put the name your mine to heart of golduntil you coming home,behind the tumble light waiting.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ridwan Nurwansyah que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “my mine ,I searching for you ..long time in the trip time walls,searching you in was me..I never …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, heartofgold, inspiracional, com foco em inspiracao e dia-chuvoso.
